input.background: Air samples were collected on eight successive days at two different sites. Particulate matter was measured in these samples as an index of environmental quality.
input.question: Analyze the variability of readings at both sites using stemplots.

output.answer: Side-by-side stemplots reveal different pictures, with much greater variability of readings at site 1.

Day.description: The sequence of days on which air samples were collected.

Site.description: The locations where air samples were collected.

Particulate Matter.value: Values for particulate matter measurements at each site for each day
Particulate Matter.description: The measured particulate matter in air samples, used as an index of environmental quality.
